summary: P2 Feature 1: Client Onboarding Email Drip - All components verified and working
feature_tested: Client Onboarding Email Drip - automated 3-email sequence triggered when client signs a contract

database_model.details: ClientOnboardingEnrollment table exists with correct columns: id, leadId, enrolledAt, currentStep, completed, email1SentAt, email2SentAt, email3SentAt, stoppedAt, stopReason, createdAt, updatedAt

contract_triggers_enrollment.details: POST /api/contracts/:id/agree calls enrollInOnboarding(contract.lead.id) at line 420 of contracts.ts

cron_job_registered.details: server.ts starts processOnboardingSequences with 6-hour interval. Verified in logs: 'Client onboarding processor scheduled (every 6 hours)'

email_function_exists.details: sendClientOnboardingEmail exists at line 2236 of email.ts with 3 step templates (welcome, portal guide, update reminder)

enrollment_service.details: enrollInOnboarding creates enrollment record and sends email 1 immediately. processOnboardingSequences handles step 2 (after 2 days) and step 3 (after 7 days)

no_regression_contracts.details: Contract templates list works, contract create/delete works

code_verification.enrollment_call: contracts.ts lines 418-424: await enrollInOnboarding(contract.lead.id) called after contract status set to AGREED
code_verification.cron_setup: server.ts lines 266-274: 6-hour interval with initial run after 20s delay

email_templates.step_1_welcome: Subject: Welcome! Let's Get Started on Your {projectType}
email_templates.step_2_portal_guide: Subject: Quick Guide to Your Client Portal

critical_code_review_comments: All P2 Feature 1 components implemented correctly
enrollInOnboarding properly wrapped in try-catch to prevent blocking contract agreement on email failures
processOnboardingSequences correctly calculates 2-day and 7-day delays using timestamp arithmetic
Email step labels correctly defined: Welcome, Portal Guide, Update Reminder
Cron runs every 6 hours as specified
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up TEST_OnboardingDrip Client lead for contract testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: P2 Feature 1 (Client Onboarding Drip) fully verified: DB model exists with all columns, TypeScript compiles, enrollment triggered on contract agreement, cron job running every 6 hours, email templates for all 3 steps. Test account: test@test.com / Test123456!. No regressions in existing features (digest, auth, leads, contracts).

feature_summary.feature_1_onboarding_drip: COMPLETE - All 8 verification points passed: DB model, tsc compiles, contract trigger, cron registered, email templates exist, enrollment service works, no regressions
